channel.title: SpeakForWater
channel.description: Making water resources research accessible to everyone. Join Anna and Ehsan as they discuss the latest open-access papers on hydrology, flood management, remote sensing, and water engineering — explained in plain language for farmers, water managers, and anyone who cares about water.
channel.itunes:author: Ehsan Kahrizi

item.title: Ep 23: Towards a typology for hybrid compound flood modeling
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 23: Towards a typology for hybrid compound flood modeling. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/1397/2026/hess-30-1397-2026.pdf

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: Ep 9: How does integrating multi-scale monitoring and compound-specific isotope analysis improve the evaluation of S -metolachlor degradation in agro-ecosystems?
item.description: SpeakForWater Episode 9: How does integrating multi-scale monitoring and compound-specific isotope analysis improve the evaluation of S -metolachlor degradation in agro-ecosystems?.
